<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Plugins\Actions; use Pest\Contracts\Plugins; use Pest\Plugin\Loader; /** * @internal */ final class CallsTerminable { /** * Executes the Plugin action. * * Provides an opportunity for any plugins to terminate. */ public static function execute(): void { $plugins = Loader::getPlugins(Plugins\Terminable::class); /** @var Plugins\Terminable $plugin */ foreach ($plugins as $plugin) { $plugin->terminate(); } } }
